name: Philippine Lumpias
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Potatoes, chopped to about 1/2 inch x 1 inch or smaller
Salt and ground pepper to taste
1 Package of spring roll wrappers (contains about 35 wrappers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small amount of vegetable oil in a pan. Add garlic and onion, and sauté until the onions become transparent.
2. Add meat and cook until browned.
3. Stir in soy sauce and simmer for about 15 minutes.
4. Add shredded vegetables (carrots, celery, potatoes) and continue to simmer for another 10 minutes.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely for approximately one hour.
6. When cooled, wrap each filling in a spring roll wrapper, folding the edges securely.
7. Fry the lumpias in hot vegetable oil until they are golden brown.
8. Serve with sweet and sour sauce.
